records.description: The compose up path does not call clear_markers() on --remove-existing-container (crates/deacon/src/commands/up/compose.rs), unlike the single-container path. It does not surface functionally because execute_compose_post_create does not consult markers, so this is a parity-only cleanup difference with no executable case yet. Characterized in CLAUDE.md 'Verified Non-Bugs'.
